reviews.text: Contacted them about an issue with a car dealership, was told id be called back, never heard from them again. Could have called, texted, emailed, told me i had no case, called me the tooth fairy and told me to fly away, any of those options I feel are better for an attorney than disappearing.

Horrible experience.  You have to remind them multiple times to get anything done.  Then the documents they write up are wrong. I had to proofread everything they did for ridiculous mistakes.  I had to submit documents multiple times because they lost them.  They rarely even respond to emails or calls. They still have not completed all the paperwork for my case that went to court over 6 months ago.
I have used them since 2004 and wouldn't use anyone else. They are patient and kind
Very helpful in walking me through the steps of estate planning and what to do and what to expect.
Rose is awesome!
Nice

We have used this law firm on several different occasions for various legal matters over the last 20 years. Without hesitation, I would highly recommend this law firm.  They have always been very helpful & professional.
Great people.  Lauren and Rose are the best!
Great caring staff
Horrible experience with this law firm. Very unprofessional.

Jacob is a pleasure to work with, felt like family from the beginning, everything was easy to understand , he made recommendations that made sense for our needs and completed everything in a timely fashion… welcome to our circle of friends Jacob.. Rodney and Connie Plack

Highly recommend HootOwl for your estate planning needs.  Luke and team were extremely helpful and flexible throughout the entire process.  We had a lot of questions and concerns, but never felt in the dark with Luke guiding us through it!
Professional and knowledgeable. Guided and explained each step of the process. Mr Lively went above and beyond, it was a great experience!
Incredibly happy with our experience with Luke and the team at Hoot Owl. They never made us feel pressured, just a kind and trustworthy group. Highly recommend.
Jacob Lively took something that felt overwhelming and made it simple and straightforward. His professionalism, clarity, and genuine care gave us complete confidence in every decision.
Luke and team were very helpful. They were prompt and helped answer our questions.

I began this journey with limited information in the process. Jacob walked me through it, was informative and helpful in teaching me important things I was unaware of before I spoke to him. After the establishing a plan for myself AND my family, I walked out of his office feeling wiser and much more prepared for whatever the future holds! I feel that I have a new friend and can call him at any time with any further questions or needed advice.

Jacob was very helpful and gracious in helping us through some unique challenges we faced. Grateful for his guidance to help us get our estate planning completed. He and his team are all great people who care about taking care of you!  Highly recommended.
Very professional and answered all my many questions about estate planning.

Luke and his team are great people.  He did a really nice job of explaining our Estate planning options.    They also saved us saved us future misery by finding and correcting an error on the deed to our house.

If you don't have a Will or Trust currently in place,  you need to reach out to them and get the process started.   It doesn't take nearly as long as you think.  They make the process quick and painless.

Luke was so helpful and patient with us! We felt cared for and seen in just one hour of consultation with him. His crew makes sure you have all the information you need to plan for yourself, your family and your legacy. An amazing team and services!!
HootOwl did a wonderful job helping us with our family’s legal needs.  I would highly recommend them!

I put off doing my estate plan for far too long, but working with Luke Brasuell made the process easy and stress-free. He was approachable, answered all my questions, and explained everything clearly. It is a relief to have this taken care of the right way.
Detailed and thorough. Easy to work with and efficient. Highly recommend.
Really timely and affordable help when we needed it.
Jacob and Luke are both articulate and were detrimental in educating us on our living trust. Both are friendly, personable and knowledgeable. We highly recommend Hoot Owl, Jacob and Luke.
Legal services you can count on

Me and my wife felt extremely understood and served in our process of putting together our Estate Plan. Luke & Jacob both have the ability to take any question and explain it in a way that makes sense. Can't recommend using them for your Estate Plan enough.
What a wonderful experience my husband and I had during the creation of our family trust.   We can't recommend HootOwl enough!
Incredible team and great experience. They make the estate planning process as easy as possible.
Would highly recommend HootOwl.  Overall it was a seamless experience and Jacob was great. He listens and makes thoughtful recommendations.   I would not hesitate to refer friends and family to him.

HootOwl did an amazing job with our Estate Planning process. It was simple, clear, and easy to follow. Luke did an incredible job explaining everything to us and answering all of our questions. 10/10 highly recommend!
Luke was great to work with! Very flexible for scheduling since we had a baby. He answered all of our questions and walked us through the whole process. Highly recommended.

We did work with Luke at HootOwl and couldn't be more happy! We care deeply about taking care of our family and they do too. Their communication was clear and they exceeded our expectations. I highly recommend using them and I'm thankful they helped us achieve some goals!

This was the opposite (in the BEST way) of what I thought estate planning would be like. Jacob was transparent, educational, unrushed, and all around professional. Even down to the little things like gladly welcoming our young children to sit in the office during our meeting. If you are a family who hasn’t  done this yet because you were dreading it… Jacob is your guy!

We had an amazing experience estate planning with Jacob! After putting off writing a will for over two years my father needed surgery. We knew we had to get it done right away and Jacob came to our rescue. With his friendly style he made it easy and simple. He listened to our concerns, made sure our family's situation was covered, and explained everything to us along the way. And he got it done in record time. Thank you, Jacob! It was a pleasure.
Estate Planning does not have to be intimidating! Jacob and Gracie are outstanding individuals who have made it so approachable. HootOwl uniquely brings joy through the process!
The best of the best!
HootOwl is the best!  My husband and I had a great experience and we definitely recommend HootOwl to anyone looking for custom Estate planning!

Stephen did a great job with my divorce. Listened well and kept my best interests at the forefront. Conversation was easy like talking to a friend. Thank you Stephen and Martin Attorneys for helping with my case!!
Stephen was prompt returning calls & letting me know the status of my case. I would definitely use his services again.

Stephen represented me in a custody modification, the results were somewhere between lackluster and offensive. Stephen and his legal assistant were unresponsive and seemed to have their own interest ahead of mine. My modification was a slam dunk, the other party attested on drug felonies and homeless, yet it took months and thousands of dollars just for the agreement we made to be changed ɓerfore it was submitted to the court without my knowledge or approval. Seek alternate counsel..
Stephen Fischer represented me. I was not impressed. If you are going to court because you want to be in your kids' lives I urge you to seek different counsel.

I strongly recommend looking for an alternative. This is someone I would NEVER recommend or allow to represent me again. This was a horrible experience and extremely overpriced. Be prepared to pay for actions taken without your knowledge or approval, unnecessary billable actions taken on your behalf, and to feel like you are locked into representation that has their own interests in mind. I hope anyone that reads this is encouraged to do some research before getting into something you can not get yourself out of with Steve. He only called me from private numbers and was unavailable when I had questions and would reach out to the office phone. Zuliema, his gatekeeper, was equally unavailable and unhelpful.

If you ever need a down-to-earth attorney, for a very fair price,  that you can literally tell anything to... Mr. Webb is your guy. He's very practical and pragmatic. It's been an absolute pleasure working with him. I strongly recommend him.
I got a ticket driving through Arkansas and DWebblaw handled everything for me.  Highly recommended due to having the best possible outcome.  Thanks DWebb!!
I paid 50$ for a consult . I wasn't there for 10mins he didn't listen to one word I said and continuously interrupted me then had the nerve to quote me almost 10k lol
I needed his help really bad & he wouldn't help me. Now my husband is going to be in prison for 2  years if not more.
Terrible service. They charge exorbitant prices and don't provide complete information when they handle your case. 👎👎👎
Informative. Uplifting. Skilled. Very well versed. Keen sense of Humour.
Only difference between this office and a public defender is he showed up to court. Otherwise a waste of money

Very very friendly staff! Will never forget my visit with them especially since the "Laura" made me feel so welcomed! Mr. Webb was extremely down to earth and reassuring. Was very helpful in answering my questions. Also very willing to help me if needed. If I ever need a lawyer he will definitely be at the top of my list to pick. Thank you for a warming experience. Lawyers have always made me uncomfortable and I have always felt that I would be judged if ever needed to hire one. Mr. Webb help to knock that unease out of my mind and didn't have the least bit of judgement. In-fact he kinda of gave me the grandfather talk of making good decisions. It was a very comforting experience. Thank you!

reviews.text:
If you're here, reading the reviews (to try and make a decision on whether or not you want to hire Austin) then you are doing exactly what I did. I searched around and got 'ehh' vibes on many lawyers. After reading Austin's reviews, it just felt right. I had a good feeling about what others were saying about him. So, I took a chance and hired him. I have no regrets about doing so. He is super easy to work with. You can easily talk to him like a friend or relative and he never made me feel like I was less than knowledgeable.

I realize that a good lawyer is more than just talking a good talk, to appease their clients. They need to know the law. Once again, I have no regrets on his skills as an attorney.  He was sharp and very informative. I've had very poor relations with attorneys (over the years) who took my money and either split with no representation or brought mediocre skills to the table. Austin, you made my situation a lot more easy than what I expected. Thank you, brother.

So, if you're still searching and feel a bit overwhelmed by your situation, take a chance on this man. He did me right. I realize how good reviews can give light to someone's character and skills. That is why I'm here writing this. To possibly help the next person make a decision.

If you're ready to end your search and move forward... stop here and give the man a call. And good luck with your situation. 🙂
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind words, Brian! I enjoyed getting to know you and helping you out!

reviews.text:
Good. Fully recommended.

Austin Lucas, as an attorney, is noble, moral, dedicated, and deliberately effective. One can assert that he attempts to carry over his personal values well into his profession, and the client is almost surely guaranteed to benefit from that. His responses and resolutions are timely, compassionate, considerate and never hasty.
Albeit colloquially an attorney his like may be called a "shark," I suppose it suffices to say that he's exceptionally goal oriented and dignified in his approach. In that, he is the falcon.
Will not hesitate to hire Mr. Lucas in the future, nor would I hesitate to recommend to friends or family.

I have never met an attorney that is as passionate about the well-being of children as Austin! We began the process years ago and Austin has sat through my case thick and thin, has guided and redirected me when necessary to see what is best for my child whom I now have custody of. By no means is he a pushover attorney, and he will play his cards professionally without backing down! We payed thousands to another attorney who couldn't even do anything close to what Austin has done for my son and his future!
I could not recommend anyone other than Mr. Lucas! He has made dreams that seemed impossible come to life and has stuck by the truth!
His character is not often seen in this crazy world and his ability to make you laugh even if you don't want to makes all the difference when things got rough.
Austin was great to work with! Made things simple and easy for us!

Coming in as a young father to a custody case is a bit intimidating but Austin did his due diligence and made me feel comfortable. He’s a straight shooter and an absolute shark. I would trust him to defend me in any case I’m involved in. He’s a phenomenal attorney and a great man, he even officiated my marriage. I would recommend him to anybody facing any situation requiring an attorney!
Fantastic person and even better attorney. He will work for you at every turn and ensure you are treated fairly.

Attorney Kedron Benhan, please return my money. I do not recommend him at all. I gave him $2,500. He accepted my case in August of last year (2022) and has done nothing for it since. He said he would send my asylum application to the government and send me a copy, but he never sent me one. I call and write to him, and he doesn't answer. Please, attorney, return my money. You know I'm borrowing money to have my case handled. Don't be inhumane; what you're doing is wrong.

This man is a crook he is a lair he led me and my husband in for years telling us it was almost over had us keep sending money to him that apparently he was pocketing will be contacting someone about this lawyer go else where don’t trust him he has done this to other clients as well and he lies to cover his behind we had been with him since 2015 and never worked the case and he would never call back office would never answer when we call. Everyone needs to file a complaint with state bar on him that has had issue we are in the process of contacting a malpractice lawyer
It was horrible.
This was the worst experience I’ve ever had. This lawyer is a crook, and has led my family on for years. Go somewhere else.
Do not waste your time with him. My parents wasted a lot of years with him. Do not make the same mistake.
The information received by Kedron was absolutely wrong. We followed his guidance only to find out years later that it ended up hurting us. Recommend other to seek more knowledgeable attorneys.
Very knowledgeable, sincere, and humble. You don't get intimidated, and you also feel free to speak. My friends, this is a good lawyer for our immigration issues. Thanks, Kedron.

The fact that this "company" is able to call themselves a business is nothing short of criminal. I reached out for help regarding the retrieval of my vehicle that had been burglarized while under the security of a storage facility and then forced out, leaving it vulnerable. I chose the Premium plan with LegalShield which is supposed to be like the gold standard package, covering things like assistance with simplified probate, notarization, and EXPANDED vehicle property damage collection. Amongst other things. All of which sounds reassuring but I received less than standard attention & service, with the only "action" taken being a typical letter to the opposing party. Something literally EVERYBODY does. I informed them in the beginning that the car was close to being auctioned so this matter was urgent. When I asked had the towing company or others involved been contacted I received a quick "Nope", & was told your membership doesn't cover that. My membership basically didn't cover effort. What I received in 1 month was 2 phone calls, (1 forced after I called for update) and no response to any texts but 1. When I spoke to the attorney he was very uniformed, withdrawn callous unconcerned  & just flat out lazy. He told me "if it's gone it's nothing you can do, & it was probably rightfully impounded" instead of showing compassion or any fervor to challenge. He didnt know the current status because it didnt matter to him. He couldn't care less & they couldn't either & i felt that. I've had this car for 10 years! The fact that somebody potentially may have it for $10 dollars is infuriating! I don't own a lotta things in this world & it was something that I did. To be met with this cavalier lassiez-fare 'ehh whatever' demeanor from people who seem to be twiddling their thumbs talking about Jed paw & Annie Mae all day instead of being professionals, just pours salt on the wound. To call them a joke is an insult to comedians. PLEASE do yourselves a favor people and find financially conducive alternatives to your legal problems other than LR and LegalShield.
I'm  very pleased with my Lisle Rutledge Attorney with working  me on my Will.
The staff here had a willingness to listen, compassion, good judgement and great communication. When it comes to understanding the law to protect yourself, I recommend Jason and this law firm.
I've used this firm for years. Great lawyers and friendly staff. I would highly recommend.
Gino Franco is a very fair attorney.  I highly recommend Lisle Law Firm.
